title.ko: 사다리(E04F 11/00이 우선; 계단 의자 A47C 12/00; 선박용 B63B, 항공기용 B64; 비계 E04G)
title.en: LADDERS (E04F0011000000 takes precedence;step-stools A47C0012000000;adaptation of ladders to use on ships B63B, to use on aircraft B64;scaffolding E04G)

title.ko: 사다리 일반(대차(臺車)나 차량상에 설치된 것 E06C 5/00; 고정 구조물에 영구적으로 설치된 것 E06C 9/00)
title.en: Ladders in general (mounted on undercarriages or vehicles E06C0005000000;permanently attached to fixed structures E06C0009000000)

title.ko: 강성(剛性) 종부재(縱部材)가 있는 것
title.en: with rigid longitudinal member or members

title.ko: 대상물(對象物), 예. 벽, 기둥, 나무에 세워 걸치는 사다리(사다리 두부(頭部)의 지지 E06C 7/48)
title.en: Ladders for resting against objects, e.g. walls, poles, trees (supports for ladder heads E06C0007480000)
in one piece
multi-part
Sections fitted end to end
extensible, e.g. telescopic

title.ko: 그 자체로서 서 있을 수 있는 사다리
title.en: Ladders capable of standing by themselves

title.ko: 지상에 놓이는 지주(支柱)를 갖는 것(사다리에 고정된 지주(支柱)를 갖는 것 E06C 1/24; 단(壇)을 갖는 것 E06C 1/39)
title.en: with struts which rest on the ground (with struts rigid with the ladder E06C0001240000;having platforms E06C0001390000)
with supporting struts formed as ladders
with supporting struts formed as poles
with extensible, e.g. telescopic, ladder parts or struts

title.ko: 저절로 서는 사다리
title.en: Free-standing ladders
in one piece

title.ko: 복합체의 것(사다리로서 구성된 가동성 지지 지주(支柱)를 갖는 것 E06C 1/18)
title.en: multi-part (with movable supporting struts formed as ladders E06C0001180000)
extensible, e.g. telescopic
Ladders with a strut which is formed as a ladder and can be secured in line with the ladder

title.ko: 창, 코니스(cornice) , 기둥 또는 그 유사물과 같은 구조물에 설치되는 사다리(건물에 영구적으로 고착된 사다리 E06C 9/00)
title.en: Ladders attachable to structures, such as windows, cornices, poles, or the like (ladders permanently fastened to buildings E06C0009000000)
Ladders suspendable by hooks or the like

title.ko: 사다리의 특수 구조, 예. 2 이상 또는 그 이하의 종부재(縱部材)를 갖는 사다리, 가동 가로대 또는 디딤판을 갖는 사다리, 세로로 접을 수 있는 사다리
title.en: Special constructions of ladders, e.g. ladders with more or less than two longitudinal members, ladders with movable rungs or other treads, longitudinally-foldable ladders
Foldable ladders in which the longitudinal members are brought together on folding
having tip-up steps

title.ko: 단(壇)을 가진 사다리; 단(壇)으로 변경할 수 있는 사다리(사다리상에 사용하기 위한 단(壇) E06C 7/16)
title.en: Ladders having platforms; Ladders changeable into platforms (platforms for use on ladders E06C0007160000)
Ladders having platforms foldable with the ladder
characterised by having wheels, rollers, or runners
with non-rigid longitudinal members
of the lazy-tongs type
Rope or chain ladders
with both rigid and non-rigid longitudinal members

title.ko: 대차(臺車)나 차량상에 설치된 것을 특징으로 하는 사다리; 차량에서의 사다리의 고정(바퀴, 롤러, 런너를 갖는 사다리 E06C 1/397)
title.en: Ladders characterised by being mounted on undercarriages or vehicles; Securing ladders on vehicles (ladders having wheels, rollers, or runners E06C0001397000)

title.ko: 강성 종부재를 갖는 것
title.en: with rigid longitudinal members

title.ko: 승강 또는 신장될 수 있는 것
title.en: capable of being elevated or extended
by piston and cylinder, or equivalent means, operated by a pressure medium
derived directly from a pressure reservoir
charged by a pump or compressor driven by the motor of the vehicle or another motor on the vehicle
derived directly from a pump or compressor
driven by the motor of the vehicle or another motor on the vehicle

title.ko: 유체 또는 기타 비기계적 커플링 또는 클러치를 사용하거나 또는 사용하지 않고 기계적 전도(傳導)만을 사용하는 것
title.en: using mechanical transmission only, with or without fluid or other non-mechanical couplings or clutches
using power from the motor of the vehicle or another motor

title.ko: 수동식으로 사용하는 것(사다리에 의하여 지지되는 수동식 신장 수단 E06C 7/04)
title.en: using hand-power (hand-operated extending means carried by the ladder E06C0007040000)

title.ko: 스프링 또는 스프링의 보조에 의한 것(E06C 5/06, E06C 5/16이 우선)
title.en: by, or with the assistance of, springs (E06C0005060000, E06C0005160000 take precedence)
Dismounting ladders from vehicles
with non-rigid longitudinal members
of the lazy-tongs type
formed of links which reinforce themselves against each other

Indicating devices
Safety devices against slipping or falling of ladders; Safety devices against overloading ladders
Devices for blocking the springs of the vehicle; Devices for supporting the undercarriage directly from the ground
Devices for canting ladders laterally
Devices for altering inclination; Latching devices therefor
Other accessories on ladders, e.g. acoustical signalling devices, dismountable switchboards

title.ko: 구성 부품, 지지 부재 또는 부속구

title.ko: 신장(伸張) 수단(대차(臺車)나 차량상에 설치된 사다리용의 것 E06C 5/00)
title.en: Extending means (for ladders mounted on undercarriages or vehicles E06C0005000000)
Hand-operated extending means carried by the ladder
Securing devices or hooks for parts of extensible ladders
Special construction of longitudinal members, or rungs or other treads
Reinforcements for ladders
Lifts or other hoisting devices on ladders
Holders for pails or other equipment on or for ladders

title.ko: 사다리상 또는 사다리상에서 사용하기 위한 단(壇), 예. 승강대(昇降臺)(승강에 관한 사항 B66F)
title.en: Platforms on, or for use on, ladders, e.g. liftable or lowerable platforms (aspects relating to the lifting B66F)

title.en: Devices for preventing persons from falling (life-saving belts A62B0001160000)

title.en: Ladder feet; Supports therefor  (for scaffold elements E04G0005020000)
Means for mounting ladders on uneven ground
Non-skid equipment
Ladder heads; Supports for heads of ladders for resting against objects
Joints or other connecting parts

title.ko: 고정 구조물에 영구적으로 설치된 것을 특징으로 하는 사다리, 예. 화재 대피용(待避用)(가동(可動) 계단 E04F 11/04)

forming part of a building, such as a balcony grid, window grid, or other window part
laterally displaceable
with non-rigid longitudinal members, e.g. rope or chain ladders, ladders of the lazy-tongs type
